final:
module decoder3to8 (
	input clk,
	input [2:0] in,
	output reg [7:0] out);

	always @(posedge clk) begin
		out <= 8'b00000000;
		out[in] <= 1;
	end
	
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out[0] <= ~clk; out[1] <= clk & in[0]; out[2] <= ~in[1]; out[3] <= in[2] | out[1];
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out[0] <= ~clk; out[1] <= clk & in[0]; out[2] <= ~in[1]; out[3] <= in[2] | out[1];
